Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer For Purposes Of Consolidation
Off Calendar Apr-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: KELLY A. CORCORAN, ESQ., 415.371.8500, FOR DEFENDANTS THE DANKO LAW FIRM AND MICHAL DANKO; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS THE DANKO LAW FIRM, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AND MICHAEL DANKO'S Motion To Transfer For Purposes Of Consolidation is granted in part and denied in part. Case BC479107 is transferred. The request to transfer the probate estate (Case BP112915) is denied without prejudice. The probate is venued in Los Angeles County, and San Francisco should not be taking over the probate the estate. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
